title: QV Baby Gentle Wash 500ml - with Vitamin B3 & Glycerin, Delicate Soap-Free, pH-Balanced For Everyday Use Suitable For Face, Body & Hair, Body Wash For Sensitive Skin, Eczema, Psoriasis, Bath
features: GENTLE CLEANSER FOR BABIES: made for sensitive and delicate skin, this body wash cleanses and soothes with low-irritantation formula: fragrance-free, vegan, pH-Balanced, soap-free & dye-free, supporting the natural protective properties of the skin.

SOFT & NOURISHING FOR YOUR BABY’S SKIN: Enriched with 15% glycerin and Vitamin B3, the wash helps to support the skin’s barrier while providing deep hydration, keeping baby’s skin moisturised. Suitable for eczema & psoriasis.

SOAP-FREE FORMULA: Our sensitive QV Baby Gentle Wash is free from harsh soaps, making it perfect for the dry and sensitive skin of babies. It gently cleanses without stripping the skin of its natural oil barrier, which many soap-based washes can do.

DERMATOLOGIST RECOMMENDED: Clinically tested and recommended by dermatologists for babies with different skin types, including sensitive skin conditions like eczema, psoriasis, dry scalp, cradle cap or dermatitis, offering expert care.

HEAD TO TOE BABY BODY WASH: Versatile and gentle enough for everyday use on the face and around the eyes (baby’s face, body & hair), this wash has been ophthalmologically tested and trusted to ensure it won’t sting or irritate baby’s eyes.
description: Product Description QV Baby Gentle Wash is formulated to cleanse delicate and sensitive skin - perfect for a soft, yet nourishing, baby bath. Created for the Queen Victoria (QV) Dermatology ward for Children and Women's health in Melbourne, Australia our Gentle Wash was formulated with baby’s skin in mind. Their skin is much more fragile as the protective barrier has not fully developed. This means that it is more vulnerable to irritants and takes longer to repair from everyday wear and tear. To tackle this, QV Baby Gentle Wash with its pH balanced, low-irritant formulation cleanses and moisturises the skin. It contains Vitamin B3 to help support a healthy skin barrier and natural protective properties. It is suitable for eczema-prone skin, dermatitis and psoriasis. You can use the wash every day on your baby’s body and face and hair as a baby shampoo. Apply to wet skin and lightly massage. Rinse and gently pat skin dry. For best results apply QV Baby Moisturising Cream after bathing. For use in bath or shower. With over 70 years of experience in catering for sensitive and delicate skin, QV has your baby’s comfort at the forefront of product development. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Sodium Lauroyl Sarcosinate, Disodium Cocoamphodiacetate, Lauryl Betaine, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Aminomethyl Propanol, Methylparaben, Propylparaben. Directions Apply desired amount of QV Baby Gentle Wash to wet skin and lightly massage. Rinse and gently pat skin dry. For best results apply QV Baby Moisturising Cream immediately after bathing. Safety Warning For external use only. See more
